citations: demiurge design.md D109 — Energy/solar cell + NREL MIDC pyranometer GHI direction (κ-68 G27)
kernel_reuse: pvlib clearsky/transposition trusted bridge (substrate-parity proven on stdlib/kernels/solar/pvlib_kernel.py)

measured_oracle.dataset_caveats: daylight samples (zenith<85.0°): 829; clear-sky kept (ratio in [0.85,1.3)): 480; dropped cloudy/cloud-enhanced: 349. modeled = pvlib 0.13.0 Ineichen clearsky (Linke-turbidity climatology · D80 substrate-parity PASS at κ-65). measured side = research-grade vented + thermally corrected CMP22 pyranometer.
measured_oracle.oracle_source: NREL MIDC BMS (SRRL Golden CO) · pyranometer GHI Global CMP22 (vent/cor) · 2024-06-15 · 1-min cadence

scope_caveats: single clear-sky day (2024-06-15); mean rel_err over 480 clear-sky-filtered samples vs pvlib Ineichen clearsky modeled GHI.

modeled stack uses pvlib clearsky (Ineichen) + sun position; the latter has D80 substrate-parity vs hexa-native `solar_position_kernel` (κ-65 21/21 PASS at rel_err <= 1e-13) — the hexa-native call site is a G29-β follow-on (substrate-parity already proven, runtime port is the next axis).
Linke-turbidity climatology assumption inherent in Ineichen — not site-specific aerosol retrieval.
